tagline: Automated video editing tools for content creators

policies.refund_policy: No refunds after 7 days of purchase.
policies.support_policy: 24/7 support is available only on the Pro plan. Basic plan users receive email support during business hours.
policies.trial_policy: No free trial currently available. Plans can be cancelled anytime before the next billing cycle.

faq.question: What platforms does AutoStream support?
faq.answer: AutoStream supports exports for YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, and all major social media platforms.

faq.question: Can I upgrade from Basic to Pro?
faq.answer: Yes, you can upgrade at any time. The price difference will be prorated for the current billing cycle.

faq.question: Does AutoStream have an API?
faq.answer: Yes, API access is available on the Pro plan for developers who want to integrate AutoStream into their workflow.
